description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine gic_2, and is implemented by a call to gic_2. Use this API to calculate Geomagnetically Induced Currents (GIC) in electric power system network as a result of Geomagnetic Disturbance (GMD). This API routine was first introduced in release 32.2.0 and 33.3.0. ierr = gic(sid, all, apioptns, values, rptoptns, gicdatafil, gicaddfil, gicpurgfil, gicrnwkfil)
python_syntax: ierr = gic(sid, all, apioptns, values, rptoptns, gicdatafil, gicaddfil, gicpurgfil, gicrnwkfil)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: apioptns
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying Integer Options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying Real Options. (input).

parameters.name: rptoptns
parameters.description: An array of seven elements specifying Report Options. (input).

parameters.name: gicdatafil
parameters.description: Gic data file name (input). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: gicaddfil
parameters.description: Gic updates to base case file name (output). (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: gicpurgfil
parameters.description: Rdch file to remove gic updates from gic updated case in working memory to set it back to base case network condition (output). (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: gicrnwkfil
parameters.description: Gic dc resistive network raw file. this represents the dc network used to calculate gic flow (output). (input; blank by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apioptns.description: Electric Field Type (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘efield_type’.
Units of Electric Field Magnitude (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘efield_unit’.
Option to add GIC updates to base case (1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘addfile_optn’.
create RDCH raw file of GIC updates.
Number of levels of inter-tie buses to add to study subsystem (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘tielevels’.
consider only study subsystem buses, no buses from inter-ties.
consider only study subsystem buses, no buses from inter-ties.

values.description: electric field magnitude in units defined by charoptns(2), not used when charoptns(1)=nonuniform (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘efield_mag’.
when charoptns(1)=benchmark, when specified as 0.0, it will be set to 8.0 V/km (default benchmark event strength).
electric field direction in degrees, range 0 to 360 degrees (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘efield_deg’.
when charoptns(1)=uniform or benchmark, not used when charoptns(1)=nonuniform.
substation grounding dc resistance in ohms (0.1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘substation_r’.
transmission line X/R ratio, must be >0, used to calculate branch DC resistance if R=0.0 in network data (30 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘branch_xbyr’.
transformer winding X/R ratio, must be >0, used to calculate winding DC resistance if R=0.0 in network data (30 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘transformer_xbyr’.

rptoptns.description: what to report (-1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rptoptn’.
Report these many maximum values in each category.
report induced branch voltages (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rptbrn_indv’.
report DC bus voltages (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rptdc_busv’.
report branch GIC flows (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rptbrn_gic’.
report transformer GIC flows (1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rpttrn_gic’.
report substation GIC flows (0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rptstn_gic’.
report transformer losses (1 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rpttrn_q’.

error_codes.description: DLL not loaded or entry point not found.
